message:
feat(actor): add ActorContext struct and close bd-1js3

Implements ActorContext as an actor-specific Cx extension with:
- MailboxConfig for mailbox configuration
- SupervisorMessage enum for supervision events
- ActorContext struct with:
  - Self-reference methods (self_ref, self_actor_id)
  - Child management (register_child, unregister_child, children)
  - Self-termination (stop_self, is_stopping)
  - Parent interaction (parent, has_parent, escalate)
  - Cx delegation via Deref
- 6 unit tests for ActorContext functionality

Closes bd-1js3.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
